title: Editable templates by all Admin users
excerpt: I’d like to request - that templates set up in CRM side that are shared with the whole team, can also be edited by ANY admin users on my team.

posts.author: amanda-22 (Amanda Ashton)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to request - that templates set up in CRM side that are shared with the whole team, can also be edited by ANY admin users on my team.
